title: Ruby Red Diamonds - Weapons Expanded
description: Replaces the diamond weapons with a ruby color, or blood red.
body:
Back at it again with these packs.
This time its Weapons Expanded.
- Replaces all diamond weapon textures with a ruby red color.

    **
```
 Up next is Weaponworks and then Metal Barrels.
```
**

Get the main resource pack before this one.
[>>>> MAIN RESOURCE PACK](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/ruby-red-diamonds)
